@graph.name: ISCC - image analysis workflow example
@graph.description:
An example how ISCC codes can be used to verify image analysis steps

## Associated Tutorial

This workflows is part of the tutorial [Content Tracking and Verification in Galaxy Workflows with ISCC-SUM](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/topics/imaging/tutorials/iscc-suite/tutorial.html), available in the [GTN](https://training.galaxyproject.org)

## Features

* Includes [Galaxy Workflow Tests](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/faqs/gtn/workflow_run_test.html)
* Includes a [Galaxy Workflow Report](https://training.galaxyproject.org/training-material/faqs/galaxy/workflows_report_view.html)
